overview: Manille is a team-based trick-taking game for 4 players. Players 1 & 3 form a team against Players 2 & 4.
cardRanking: Card Ranking: 10 (Manille) > A > K > Q > J > 9 > 8 > 7
trumpChoice: The dealer chooses the trump suit or plays without trump (points doubled).
goingAlong: The opposing team can 'go along' to double points if they think they'll score more.
goingAgainst: The dealer's team can 'go against' to quadruple points (max multiplier is 4).
targetScore: Default target: First team to 101 points wins.
